prompt: Hold the deal until PG&E credit is rechecked, ask for collateral, and keep legal and credit on one internal review loop.
summary: Trading is instructed to hold the PG&E Financial Power trade (EW9838) pending an immediate credit recheck and provision of acceptable collateral; Credit and Legal are placed on a joint internal review loop and will sign off before any confirmation or settlement.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal (EW9838) — Hold and collateral request
messages.body_text: Mark — We executed a Financial Power trade with PG&E (EW9838) on 5/11. Credit/Legal previously flagged PG&E as restricted. Please do not confirm or settle this trade. Hold the position pending an immediate credit recheck and request acceptable collateral (LOC or cash margin) from PG&E as a condition to proceed. I am putting Credit (Rod Nelson) and Legal (Tana Jones) on an internal review loop; they will advise next steps. Please acknowledge.
messages.rationale: Stop settlement immediately and ensure Credit/Legal re-evaluate before proceeding.

messages.subject: URGENT: Credit recheck needed — PG&E (EW9838)
messages.body_text: Rod — We have a Financial Power trade with PG&E (EW9838) executed 5/11 that had previously been flagged by Credit/Legal. Trading has been instructed to hold. Please run an immediate credit re-evaluation and recommend whether we can proceed and what collateral (LOC, cash margin, guaranty) is required. Coordinate directly with Tana Jones in Legal and provide your recommendation and timing back to me.
messages.rationale: Obtain an updated credit assessment and clear collateral requirements before any confirmation or settlement.

messages.subject: Legal review requested — PG&E Financial Power trade (EW9838)
messages.body_text: Tana — Please review any legal constraints on proceeding with PG&E for EW9838 and prepare any documentation needed to implement requested collateral. Trading has been instructed to hold until Credit and Legal clear the counterparty. Advise whether there are contractual or regulatory issues and estimated turnaround time.
messages.rationale: Ensure Legal reviews enforceability of collateral and any contract issues and stays coordinated with Credit.

top_subjects: Legal review requested — PG&E Financial Power trade (EW9838)
PG&E Financial Power Deal (EW9838) — Hold and collateral request
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
